name: Youth Hostel Scheme
benefit_description: Affordable accommodation: Youth hostels offer a much cheaper alternative to hotels and guesthouses. Social atmosphere: Youth hostels are a great place to meet new people from all over the world. Cultural experience: Youth hostels are often located in places of cultural interest, giving you the oppor
details: The Youth Hostel Scheme is managed by the Department of Youth Affairs & Sports under the Ministry of Youth Affairs & Sports, Government of India. The Central Government provides financial assistance to the State Governments for the construction and maintenance of youth hostels. The State Governments are responsible for the day-to-day management of youth hostels.
eligibility_text: There is no age restriction but if applicant is below 18 then he/she  must be accompanied by a parent or guardian when staying in a youth hostel.
application_url: Applicant must visit the official website . Click on " Apply Now " under the Youth Hostel scheme. Select the user type and scheme name. Now fill out the require details. Upload the recent photograph.
